title: Simple Animated Guns (Fan Retextured)
description:
A New Look To The Guns of a very Amazing Mod made by ElidhanMC
also HOLY SMOKES THANK YOU GUYS FOR THE 10K!😲
body:
Hello there! this is the first post that i'll probably ever send just a little texture changing to give the guns a little more of a badass look to them and if ElidhanMC ever wanted me to take this down then bye bye to this one

so i saw this mod in curseforge and seen it was for FABRIC and i was Like WHAT this is for FABRIC?!! Looks very good and the animations too! but the way the guns looked it didnt apeal to me

so i took the pngs textures of the gun using WINRAR and edited them in PhotoShop and replace the original ones so yeah thats how it went🤣
Creators Mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-simple-animated-guns/comments
